Bash(PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python -c "
import asyncio, json
from agent_gateway.server.app import create_app
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient

app = create_app\('test-token'\)
client = TestClient\(app\)

endpoints = [
    \('GET', '/health'\),
    \('GET', '/api/status'\),
    \('GET', '/api/config'\),
    \('GET', '/api/config/defaults'\),
    \('GET', '/api/profiles/active'\),
    \('GET', '/api/profiles/sessions'\),
    \('GET', '/api/model/info'\),
    \('GET', '/api/model/options'\),
    \('GET', '/api/sessions'\),
    \('GET', '/api/sessions/search'\),
    \('GET', '/api/messaging/platforms'\),
    \('GET', '/api/cron/jobs'\),
    \('GET', '/api/analytics/usage'\),
    \('GET', '/api/logs'\),
    \('GET', '/api/env'\),
    \('GET', '/api/skills'\),
    \('GET', '/api/tools/toolsets'\),
    \('GET', '/api/providers/oauth'\),
    \('GET', '/api/providers/validate'\),
    \('GET', '/api/audio/elevenlabs/voices'\),
]

ok = 0
fail = 0
for method, path in endpoints:
    resp = client.get\(path\) if method == 'GET' else client.post\(path\)
    if resp.status_code == 200:
        ok += 1
    else:
        fail += 1
        print\(f'  FAIL {method} {path} → {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:100]}'\)

print\(f'Result: {ok} passed, {fail} failed out of {len\(endpoints\)} endpoints'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=/home/ryanli/Data/Projects/Agents/agent-gateway/src /home/ryanli/Data/Projects/Agents/agent-gateway/.venv/bin/python -m agent_gateway --port 19876 &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 2
echo "--- Testing endpoints ---"
for path in /health /api/status /api/config /api/config/defaults /api/profiles/active /api/profiles/sessions /api/model/info /api/model/options /api/sessions /api/sessions/search /api/messaging/platforms /api/cron/jobs /api/analytics/usage /api/logs /api/env /api/skills /api/tools/toolsets /api/providers/oauth /api/providers/validate /api/audio/elevenlabs/voices; do
  CODE=$\(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "http://127.0.0.1:19876${path}"\)
  if [ "$CODE" = "200" ]; then
    echo "  OK  $path"
  else
    BODY=$\(curl -s "http://127.0.0.1:19876${path}"\)
    echo "  FAIL \($CODE\) $path → $BODY"
  fi
done
kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null
wait $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null
echo "--- Done ---")

import sys, asyncio
sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\)
from agent_gateway.server.app import create_app
app = create_app\('test-token'\)
print\(f'App created with {len\(app.routes\)} routes'\)
for r in sorted\(app.routes, key=lambda r: getattr\(r, 'path', ''\)\):
    methods = ','.join\(getattr\(r, 'methods', set\(\)\) or []\)
    path = getattr\(r, 'path', ''\)
    if path.startswith\('/api/'\):
        print\(f'  {methods:20s} {path}'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys, asyncio, json
sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\)

from agent_gateway.server.app import create_app
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient

app = create_app\('test-token'\)
client = TestClient\(app\)

endpoints = [
    \('GET', '/health'\),
    \('GET', '/api/status'\),
    \('GET', '/api/sessions'\),
    \('GET', '/api/sessions/search'\),
    \('GET', '/api/sessions/test-id'\),
    \('GET', '/api/sessions/test-id/messages'\),
    \('GET', '/api/profiles'\),
    \('GET', '/api/profiles/active'\),
    \('GET', '/api/profiles/sessions'\),
    \('GET', '/api/config'\),
    \('GET', '/api/config/defaults'\),
    \('GET', '/api/config/schema'\),
    \('GET', '/api/model/info'\),
    \('GET', '/api/model/options'\),
    \('GET', '/api/model/auxiliary'\),
    \('GET', '/api/model/recommended-default'\),
    \('GET', '/api/env'\),
    \('GET', '/api/providers/validate'\),
    \('GET', '/api/providers/oauth'\),
    \('GET', '/api/skills'\),
    \('GET', '/api/tools/toolsets'\),
    \('GET', '/api/tools/toolsets/test'\),
    \('GET', '/api/tools/toolsets/test/config'\),
    \('GET', '/api/tools/toolsets/test/provider'\),
    \('GET', '/api/logs'\),
    \('GET', '/api/messaging/platforms'\),
    \('GET', '/api/cron/jobs'\),
    \('GET', '/api/cron/jobs/test-id'\),
    \('GET', '/api/analytics/usage'\),
    \('GET', '/api/audio/elevenlabs/voices'\),
    \('GET', '/api/actions/test/status'\),
    \('GET', '/api/providers/oauth/test-prov/poll/test-sess'\),
    \('POST', '/api/auth/ws-ticket'\),
    \('POST', '/api/gateway/restart'\),
    \('POST', '/api/hermes/update'\),
    \('POST', '/api/cron/jobs/test-id/pause'\),
    \('POST', '/api/cron/jobs/test-id/resume'\),
    \('POST', '/api/cron/jobs/test-id/trigger'\),
    \('DELETE', '/api/providers/oauth/sessions/test-id'\),
    \('PUT', '/api/skills/toggle'\),
    \('PUT', '/api/tools/toolsets/test'\),
    \('PUT', '/api/cron/jobs/test-id'\),
]

passed = 0
failed = 0
for method, path in endpoints:
    r = client.request\(method, path, headers={'X-Hermes-Session-Token': 'test-token'}\)
    status = '✓' if r.status_code == 200 else '✗'
    if r.status_code != 200:
        failed += 1
        print\(f'  {status} {method:6s} {path:50s} → {r.status_code} {r.text[:80]}'\)
    else:
        passed += 1
        print\(f'  {status} {method:6s} {path}'\)

print\(f'\\n{passed}/{passed+failed} passed, {failed} failed'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(AGENT_GATEWAY_SESSION_TOKEN=test-tok /home/ryanli/Data/Projects/Agents/agent-gateway/.venv/bin/python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '/home/ryanli/Data/Projects/Agents/agent-gateway/src'\)
import uvicorn
from agent_gateway.server.app import create_app
app = create_app\('test-tok'\)
uvicorn.run\(app, host='127.0.0.1', port=19876, log_level='error'\)
" &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 2

BASE="http://127.0.0.1:19876"
PASS=0; FAIL=0

test_ep\(\) {
    local method=$1 path=$2
    local code
    code=$\(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X "$method" "$BASE$path"\)
    if [ "$code" = "200" ]; then
        echo "  OK   $method $path"
        PASS=$\(\(PASS+1\)\)
    else
        echo "  FAIL $method $path -> $code"
        FAIL=$\(\(FAIL+1\)\)
    fi
}

test_ep GET /health
test_ep GET /api/status
test_ep GET /api/sessions
test_ep GET /api/sessions/search
test_ep GET /api/sessions/test-id
test_ep GET /api/sessions/test-id/messages
test_ep GET /api/profiles
test_ep GET /api/profiles/active
test_ep GET /api/profiles/sessions
test_ep GET /api/config
test_ep GET /api/config/defaults
test_ep GET /api/config/schema
test_ep GET /api/model/info
test_ep GET /api/model/options
test_ep GET /api/model/auxiliary
test_ep GET /api/model/recommended-default
test_ep GET /api/env
test_ep GET /api/providers/validate
test_ep GET /api/providers/oauth
test_ep GET /api/skills
test_ep GET /api/tools/toolsets
test_ep GET /api/tools/toolsets/test
test_ep GET /api/tools/toolsets/test/config
test_ep GET /api/tools/toolsets/test/provider
test_ep GET /api/logs
test_ep GET /api/messaging/platforms
test_ep GET /api/cron/jobs
test_ep GET /api/cron/jobs/test-id
test_ep GET /api/analytics/usage
test_ep GET /api/audio/elevenlabs/voices
test_ep GET /api/actions/test/status
test_ep GET "/api/providers/oauth/test-prov/poll/test-sess"
test_ep POST /api/auth/ws-ticket
test_ep POST /api/gateway/restart
test_ep POST /api/hermes/update
test_ep POST /api/cron/jobs/test-id/pause
test_ep POST /api/cron/jobs/test-id/resume
test_ep POST /api/cron/jobs/test-id/trigger
test_ep DELETE /api/providers/oauth/sessions/test-id
test_ep PUT /api/skills/toggle
test_ep PUT /api/tools/toolsets/test
test_ep PUT /api/cron/jobs/test-id

echo ""
echo "$\(\(PASS+FAIL\)\) endpoints tested: $PASS passed, $FAIL failed"

kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null
wait $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null)
